![Meridian Sound System in Land Rover Vehicle](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/LS_Meridian-Sound)

# MERIDIANTM FOR    LAND ROVER

A PARTNERSHIP THAT DELIVERS SUPERB MUSIC ON THE MOVE

As a leader of British engineering and innovation, Land Rover shares Meridian’s drive for quality, performance and dedication to the recreation of the most authentic and immersive sound possible.

RICHARD HOLLINSHEAD

MERIDIAN CHIEF TECHNOLOGY OFFICER

## IMMERSIVE CAR HIFI

TrifieldTM\* blends channels seamlessly to distribute authentic surround sound throughout your Land Rover vehicle.

## CABIN CORRECTION

Technology that tailors audio to varied cabin surfaces of Land Rover vehicles for believable music reproduction.

## SUPERB AUDIO TECH

Meridian‡ lets you feel the rhythm of the music with exceptional definition, crystal clear highs and full, deep bass.

## AN EMOTIONAL EXPERIENCE

The state-of-the-art British audio system by Meridian brings an authentic taste of original performance to your Land Rover vehicle.

\*Trifield is only available on certain audio systems. For additional details please contact your authorized Land Rover Retailer.

- MERIDIAN SOUND SYSTEM

- MERIDIAN SURROUND SOUND SYSTEM

- MERIDIAN SIGNATURE SOUND SYSTEM


![Vehicle top view sound system icons](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/Meridian_Sound_System_Index_TC_Tab1)

## MERIDIAN SOUND SYSTEM

Your Land Rover cabin is the ideal place to experience your personal choice of music. Meridian Sound System delivers music through up to 380 watts, 13 speakers\* including a dual channel subwoofer.

Your Land Rover cabin is the ideal place to experience your personal choice of music. Meridian Sound System delivers music through up to 380 watts, 13 speakers\* including a dual channel subwoofer.

![Vehicle top view with sound system icons detailed](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/Meridian_Sound_System_Index_TC_Tab2)

## MERIDIAN SURROUND SOUND SYSTEM

Meridian Surround Sound System delivers all the fullness and clarity of a live performance through up to 19 front, side and rear speakers, 825 watts and a dual channel subwoofer – seamlessly brought together using exclusive Trifield technology by Meridian.\*

Meridian Surround Sound System delivers all the fullness and clarity of a live performance through up to 19 front, side and rear speakers, 825 watts and a dual channel subwoofer – seamlessly brought together using exclusive Trifield technology by Meridian.\*

![Vehicle top view with sound system icons in detail](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/Meridian_Sound_System_Index_TC_Tab3)

## MERIDIAN SIGNATURE SOUND SYSTEM

Meridian Signature Sound System delivers lifelike music reproduction through up to 29 speakers and 1700 watts – including a dual channel subwoofer and the world’s first in-car Trifield 3D technology to surround you with a sense of the original performance.\*

Meridian Signature Sound System delivers lifelike music reproduction through up to 29 speakers and 1700 watts – including a dual channel subwoofer and the world’s first in-car Trifield 3D technology to surround you with a sense of the original performance.\*

## MERIDIAN AUDIO TECHNOLOGY

Experience the difference. Meridian develops unique technologies to deliver believable musical performance on the move.

![Meridian Sound System Index Digital Signal CC icon](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/Meridian_Sound_System_Index_Digital_Signal_CC)

### DIGITAL SIGNAL PROCESSING

Brings all elements of the audio system together as one, for performance that would otherwise require significantly larger speakers.

![Meridian_Sound  System cabin Correction iconCC](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/Meridian_Sound_System_Index_cabin_Correction_CC)

### MERIDIAN CABIN CORRECTION

Meridian Cabin Correction has an advanced algorithm that tailors the sound experience to the precise acoustics of your Land Rover vehicle’s interior.

![Meridian Sound System Index Digital Dither CC](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/Meridian_Sound_System_Index_Digital_Dither_CC)

### MERIDIAN DIGITAL DITHER SHAPING

Meridian Digital Dither Shaping ensures that digital signal conversions are made smoothly and seamlessly, preserving the finest details of the audio performance. The result is authentic musical conversion, evoking the emotions of the original recording.

![Meridian Sound System Trifield CC](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/Meridian_Sound_System_Index_Trifield_CC)

### TRIFIELD†

Exclusive to Meridian, Trifield blends the center and surround channels seamlessly with left and right channels, delivering a consistent, concert-like experience for all occupants.

![meridian sound system cube logo](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/Meridian_Sound_System_Index_Trifield_3D_CC)

### TRIFIELD 3D

Building on proven Trifield surround sound technology by Meridian, Trifield 3D truly brings musical performances to life as the world’s first 3D in-car surround sound system. Through the addition of dedicated height channels, the sense of cabin space is expanded to a 3D experience – for a supreme sense of scale and definition to your music.

1 / 2

## MERIDIAN AND LAND ROVER

The partnership between Meridian and Land Rover celebrates the finest in British luxury, refined capabilities and custom car audio. The three Meridian audio systems feature advanced technology to create superb stereo or surround sound throughout the Land Rover cabin and to enhance musical clarity and authenticity.

![Hand Pointing to Meridian Sound System Points](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/LS-DualFrame_MeridianAndLR_281-326330_1600x900?wid=480&fit=stretch%2C1)

## THE HISTORY OF MERIDIAN

Founded in 1977 in Cambridgeshire, UK, Meridian Audio creates high-performance, car hifi sound systems in partnership with Land Rover. Meridian has pioneered many firsts including active speakers and the world’s first digital surround sound processor. Meridian audio technology has helped ensure that Land Rover cabins deliver the most superb space within which to enjoy music.

![RANGE ROVER THE HISTORY OF MERIDIAN](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/LS-DualFrame_HistoryMeridian_281-326329_1600x900?wid=480&fit=stretch%2C1)

## MERIDIAN AND LAND ROVER

The partnership between Meridian and Land Rover celebrates the finest in British luxury, refined capabilities and custom car audio. The three Meridian audio systems feature advanced technology to create superb stereo or surround sound throughout the Land Rover cabin and to enhance musical clarity and authenticity.

![Hand Pointing to Meridian Sound System Points](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/LS-DualFrame_MeridianAndLR_281-326330_1600x900?wid=480&fit=stretch%2C1)

## THE HISTORY OF MERIDIAN

Founded in 1977 in Cambridgeshire, UK, Meridian Audio creates high-performance, car hifi sound systems in partnership with Land Rover. Meridian has pioneered many firsts including active speakers and the world’s first digital surround sound processor. Meridian audio technology has helped ensure that Land Rover cabins deliver the most superb space within which to enjoy music.

![RANGE ROVER THE HISTORY OF MERIDIAN](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/LS-DualFrame_HistoryMeridian_281-326329_1600x900?wid=480&fit=stretch%2C1)

[Download](https://media.production.jlrms.com/download_archives/aec3c46d-4bb7-4765-8b2d-45248c6aef48/jaguar-land-rover-of.zip?VersionId=XRc6pwNnmvsMrNLCWK1bSKgDxhmXHWtd)
Add to Cart

# Jaguar Land Rover Offers Meridian Premium Audio

31 March 2014


Jaguar Land Rover has partnered with renowned British audio brand, Meridian™ to offer its customers the luxury of a powerful, concert‑like music experience in its vehicles.

[Download](https://media.production.jlrms.com/download_archives/aec3c46d-4bb7-4765-8b2d-45248c6aef48/jaguar-land-rover-of.zip?VersionId=XRc6pwNnmvsMrNLCWK1bSKgDxhmXHWtd)

(MAHWAH, N.J.) ‑ March 31, 2014 ‑

Jaguar Land Rover has partnered with renowned British audio
brand, Meridian to offer its customers the luxury of a powerful,
concert‑like music experience in its vehicles. Meridian applied its
award‑winning Digital Sound Processing technology and loudspeaker
engineering expertise to develop audio systems that are specially
tuned to the interiors of Jaguar and Land Rover vehicles.

Bob Stuart and Allen Boothroyd, experts in acoustical
engineering and psychoacoustics (the understanding of how humans
perceive and respond to sound) founded Meridian in Cambridge
England in 1977.  Among the company's audio innovations were
the audiophile‑quality Compact Disc player, the world's first
digital surround processor, as well as technology that became the
foundation of DVD‑Audio and part of the Blu‑Ray Disc
specification.

Meridian Systems for Jaguar and Land Rover Vehicles

Meridian engineered audio systems for Jaguar and Land Rover
models that provide exceptional definition, crystal clear highs and
full, deep bass. Meridian technology emphasizes ultra‑low
distortion, natural detail and realism. For example, a total
harmonic distortion (THD) rating of less than 1 percent is
considered to be high fidelity and inaudible to the human ear; the
Jaguar and Land Rover Meridian systems have a THD of just 0.2
percent.

That is one reason, along with Meridian's proprietary Digital
Signal Processing, that the Jaguar and Land Rover Meridian audio
systems produce output on par with systems with higher ratings,
while consuming less electrical power from the vehicle. The
380‑Watt system used in the Jaguar XF, for example, produces output
on par with the 600‑Watt system used previously.

Meridian Technologies

Through extensive research and development Meridian has
developed unique systems to give all passengers the ultimate in
authenticity and consistency of sound.  As pioneers and
leaders in the field of Digital Signal Processing (DSP) technology,
Meridian reproduces music authentically using power‑efficient,
active DSP crossovers that are individually tailored to distribute
music to each speaker.

Meridian Cabin Correction technology intelligently and
discreetly optimizes the audio system to the precise acoustics of
the vehicle cabin. This unique Meridian technology enables bass
notes to be reproduced cleanly, ensuring that the clarity and
definition of each instrument and vocal are tailored to the
interior of the vehicle's cabin.

Today, digital audio sources such as radio, USB and Bluetooth
audio streaming provide much of the music played in automobiles. As
these formats can range in quality and resolution, Meridian Digital
Dither Shaping ensures that digital signal changes are made
smoothly and seamlessly, preserving the finest details of the
recording.

Meridian's Trifield and Trifield 3D surround sound

In the upper‑end Jaguar and Land Rover Meridian audio systems,
Meridian's Trifield technology expands the sense of space within
the cabin, creating an all‑enveloping sound field that places each
occupant center stage.  Derived from an algorithm found in
Meridian's critically acclaimed digital surround processors for
home use, Trifield blends the center and surround channels
seamlessly with left and right channels, through a collection of
side, front and rear speakers, yielding a consistent, concert‑like
experience, optimized for all seating positions.

Expanding on the benefits of Trifield, Meridian's Trifield 3D is
a groundbreaking world's‑first technology that truly brings musical
performances to life. The addition of dedicated height channels
adds an increased sense of scale and definition to music. All the
instruments, performers and venues of favorite performances are
rendered in true scale and location. The result moves the listener
beyond the two‑dimension depth and width of the stage and brings
the third dimension of height to each performance.

Jaguar XF

The 2014 Jaguar XF line offers two Meridian systems. The Premium
Package adds the Meridian Sound System 380W which comes standard in
the XF Supercharged model. This can be upgraded to an optional
Meridian Surround Sound System 825W that is standard in the XFR and
XFR‑S.

The Meridian Sound System 380W utilizes 11 speakers including
one subwoofer and discrete digital amplifier sound equalization
technology. The 825W version is a 7.1‑channel surround system that
utilizes 17 speakers, including one subwoofer. The Meridian's
Trifield surround mode places each occupant in the center of the
sound field while Meridian Cabin Correction and Dynamic Volume
Control maintain consistent volume level by monitoring extraneous
noise levels and continually minimizing resonances.

Jaguar XJ

The 2014 Jaguar XJ models offer a choice of three Meridian
premium audio systems. The standard Meridian Sound System 380W
utilizes 14 speakers including two subwoofers, and separate digital
amplifier sound equalization technology. The 825W version uses a
15‑channel, 20‑speaker surround sound system and adds the
Meridian's Trifield surround mode, Meridian Cabin Correction and
Dynamic Volume Control.

The XJ long‑wheelbase models for 2014 introduce the 1,300W
Meridian Reference Surround System with 26 speakers strategically
placed around the cabin. With three additional speakers (two 80mm
speakers and one 25mm tweeter) located in the rear of each of the
front seats, the system provides rear seat passengers with a
personal soundstage experience.

This top Meridian system also integrates Conversation Assist.
Using microphones located above each seating position, this feature
channels passengers' voices through the audio system speakers,
mixing music and speech volume accordingly, to enable clearer
conversation.

Jaguar F‑TYPE

The latest addition to the Jaguar family, the F‑TYPE sports car,
offers a standard Meridian Sound System 380W with 10 speakers
including subwoofers. The separate digital amplifiers use
proprietary Meridian Digital Dither Shaping, Digital Signal
Processing and Cabin Correction. The optional Meridian Surround
Sound system 770W version (standard in F‑TYPE R Coupe) plays
through 12 speakers, including 2 subwoofers, and includes the
Meridian's Trifield surround mode.

Land Rover Meridian Systems

The pinnacle of Meridian in‑car technology, the Meridian
Signature Reference System available for the Range Rover and Range
Rover Sport, showcases the stunning 1,700W 3D Surround Sound system
with 29 speakers (23 speakers in Range Rover Sport), including a
subwoofer. Meridian's Trifield 3D technology, with speakers mounted
at roof level, offers the ultimate surround‑sound experience.

The Range Rover Evoque and Land Rover LR2 and LR4 models all
offer a 380W, 11‑speaker Meridian Sound System as well as an
optional Meridian Surround Sound System 825W with 17 speakers and
Meridian's Trifield technology.

Note: Meridian is a trademark of Meridian Audio Ltd.

           "Trifield"
and the "three fields" are trademarks of Trifield Productions
Ltd.

#  #  #

About Jaguar Land Rover

• The United States is one of the leading global markets for
both Jaguar and Land Rover

• Jaguar Land Rover employs 25,000 people and sells vehicles in
170 countries around the world

• Jaguar Land Rover has two state of the art engineering and
design facilities and three advanced manufacturing plants in the
UK

• Headquartered in Mahwah, New Jersey in the United States,
Jaguar Land Rover North America, LLC has offices across the USA

• Jaguar Land Rover is represented by more than 330
independently operated retail outletsin the USA

web.title: Meridian Sound System - Range Rover
web.description: The cutting-edge Meridian sound systems used by Range Rover, Defender, Discovery and Jaguar vehicles.
web.markdown:
[SKIP TO MAIN CONTENT](https://www.rangerover.com/en-us/explore/range-rover-chapters/meridian-sound-system.html#content)

PLEASE NOTE


We use YouTube videos on our website. To view these videos we require you to accept the cookies which YouTube will set on your device, these are categorised as non-essential functional cookies by Land Rover.


- FUNCTIONAL

MANAGE COOKIE PREFERENCES

![Range Rover Homepage](https://www.rangerover.com/en-us/explore/range-rover-chapters/meridian-sound-system.html)

![Meridian surround speaker](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/L55124GL_303101952_030_HERO)

# MERIDIANTM SOUND SYSTEM

Driving and music is a glorious combination. Taking to the road with your favorite songs is one of life’s true pleasures.

Artists from Billie Eilish to Willie Nelson play a part in developing the cutting-edge Meridian sound systems used by Range Rover, Defender, Discovery and Jaguar vehicles.

Vehicle audio has come a long way. Once upon a time, vehicles used aftermarket music players (typically cassettes) and speakers. Much noise was often generated but the sound quality was invariably terrible.

When standard audio systems became commonplace, fixed points were set by vehicle designers for the location of speakers and amplifiers. Audio specialists then tendered for the job of supplying hardware. Little wonder that most vehicle cabins were musical nightmares.

JLR’s partnership with Meridian, the Cambridge UK-based manufacturer of high-end audio entertainment, helped to change that. It was one of the first partnerships where the audio company had a significant say in vehicle cabin design, to optimize the musical experience. The partnership began in 2010 on the Range Rover Evoque, and now involves all JLR vehicles.

![Meridian Sound System diagram](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/LS-DualFrame_MeridianAndLR_281-326330_1600x900)

“Meridian has a very holistic approach,” says Samantha Morris, Meridian account manager for JLR. “We look at the vehicle as a whole, not just the audio system. We work closely with all the JLR engineering and design teams, including cabin materials, user interface, cabin design, material selection, hardware suppliers and even the NVH (noise vibration and harshness) teams.

“They all have a big influence on the audio and the overall customer experience. We’re consulted every single step of the way, so that the vehicles can provide an optimal audio experience.”

Meridian automotive engineer, Samuel Smith, is a former drummer and played acoustic guitar professionally since age 17. Music has always been part of his life. He studied music and sound recording and joined Meridian two years ago.

“It's a great relationship with JLR,” says Samuel. “We’ve also been working together for so long that JLR knows what we expect of the vehicles, including where loudspeakers should be positioned. Of course, there are always challenges, especially when they try to do something new. That’s when our relationship with the engineers becomes really important. We feel like a part of their team, they feel like a part of ours.”

![A look in detail at a Meridian Signature Sound speaker inside of a Range Rover](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/L460_22MY_124_GLHD)

JLR’s modern luxury philosophy has also changed cabin designs, affecting audio systems. Says Samantha: “A few years ago speakers were chunky and branded. Now with modern luxury, they are much more discreet and frequently hidden behind new types of fabric to give a very uncluttered aesthetic. That is a challenge. I think solving these problems and creating innovative solutions what Meridian does best.”

Different models present different challenges. Says Samuel: “The Defender vehicle has a tough utility feel, though still very modern luxury. The biggest challenge was that we couldn't use that many speakers. The cabin needed grab handles, storage spaces and door bins, reducing the room for speakers.” The Defender uses one of Meridian’s smaller systems with fewer speakers \[15 on the Meridian Surround Sound system, 11 for the Meridian Sound system: a Range Rover vehicle by comparison can have up to 36\].

“We had to develop a fantastic and very impactful sound system that will still delight customers – but with fewer speakers,” says Samuel. “We succeeded. There were other challenges. The surfaces are also more reflective on the Defender. More plastics and metals and less plush carpet. Different materials have different reflectivity and, generally speaking, plush surfaces such as carpet, leather and soft-touch foams are better for sound quality than hard, more reflective surfaces, such as glass, metal and plastic – although you do need a balance of reflective and non-reflective materials. We account for these when tuning the systems to make sure the sound quality is always optimal.”

The high-tech tuning tools include the latest RE-Q technology that intelligently optimizes the audio system to the precise acoustics of the listening environment. It proved invaluable when developing the audio systems for the Defender.

Meridian will tell you that a vehicle can be a challenging environment for sound quality. Says Samuel: “There are good points. We know where people sit – so that helps with tuning. We also tune across all the seats, so everyone gets a great audio experience. On the other hand, there’s a lot of glass and other reflective surfaces in a vehicle cabin. And speakers are rarely in the ideal position for listeners. There’s also pressure to save size and weight. It’s a challenge. But it's remarkable what we can achieve with the incredible technologies we have.”

The music must sound authentic. That is a priority for all Meridian sound systems. “You must listen to the music as the artist intended,” says Samantha. “It has to be lifelike and authentic. That is the core ethos of our business.”

![Sound System stylised representation ](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/LS-DualFrame_HistoryMeridian_281-326329_1600x900)

TrifieldTM 3D surround staging technology is a useful tool here. It ensures all instruments and performers sound realistic. Meridian’s Digital Precision also ensures the finest details of every song is retained.

However, the crucial test for authenticity and quality – and the final sign-off for every sound system – is done by ear. The huge playlist used by Meridian engineers encompasses every possible genre to test every type of music. Samuel mentions a few favorites. “There’s a track called Season’s Trees by Danger Mouse and Norah Jones that’s really good for testing the immersion and the envelopment you get from our upmixers. Plus, Awake by Tycho is great for testing the smoothness of the bass.”

Other Meridian favorites are Lost Cause by Billie Eilish (“snappy drums and crisp vocals”), Willie Nelson’s Moonlight in Vermont (“detailed vocals and clearly positioned instruments”) and Beethoven’s Symphony Number 9 (“great dynamics and a fantastic example of the full range of an orchestra”).

And favorite JLR vehicles for the total musical experience? Samuel cites the top-end Range Rover because it’s the ultimate but also – “to show how subjective audio can be” – the 11-channel Defender: “It's one of our lowest-end systems but so fun and engaging to listen to”.

Samantha mentions the Jaguar I-PACE: “I like the more intimate cabin and I find the audio very immersive.”

She also cites the Range Rover vehicle's unique tailgate. Engage the Tailgate Event Suite and you’re sitting on a comfortable rear-facing cushioned bench. Activate specially mounted rear speakers and enjoy the music either in picnic mode sitting on the seat, or in party mode as you stand around the rear of the vehicle. “The musical quality is astonishingly good. Nothing puts on a show like it.”

## MORE RANGE ROVER STORIES

![Range Rover old cars parked](https://jlr.scene7.com/is/image/jlr/RR_FIFTY_21MY_170620_01_CC)
